chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-1717 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 18.04.2024 M/s. Mahmood-ul-Hassan and Muhammad Aurangzeb, Advocates for the Petitioner. Mr. Saifullah, Assistant Advocate General. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, D.A.G. ---------------------------- Learned counsel for the petitioner under instruction does not press instant matter as according to learned counsel, pursuant to Court’s notice, respondents have done the needful and grievance of the petitioner has been redressed. Accordingly, petition stands disposed of as not pressed. CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Jamil
